payload.answer: I can’t store “everything about AI” as a durable memory. Please provide specific facts, preferences, projects, or context you want remembered, such as your AI interests, tools you use, or ongoing AI-related work.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is too broad and non-specific to form a durable personal memory. It asks to remember an entire topic rather than a concrete user-specific fact, preference, project detail, or instruction.

details: No memory was created because the request was overly broad and not user-specific.
Ambiguity was preserved: “AI” could refer to many topics, and no durable personal fact was provided.

repair_options: Specify a concrete personal fact to remember, e.g. “Remember that I’m studying transformer architectures.”
Specify a preference, e.g. “Remember that I prefer concise explanations of AI topics.”
Specify a project context, e.g. “Remember that I’m building an AI chatbot for customer support.”
